name: Rivne Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the sky and the historic Volhynian arms
the wheat and forests of Volhynia
the central field of the arms — purity

description: A blue field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Rivne Oblast — referencing the historic arms of Volhynia.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Rivne Oblast in north-western Ukraine, historically part of the Volhynian land.
